notes: Carbon fiber reinforced polymer (CFRP) laminate. Density ~1.6 g/cm³, fiber tensile ~3.5 GPa. RHAe ~0.15-0.25 per mm vs small arms — primarily structural with secondary ballistic benefit. Used in vehicle hulls, structural armor supports, and lightweight spall containment. Excellent stiffness-to-weight ratio. Fails by delamination and fiber fracture.
